source.authority: Official Gazette and Financial Services Bureau of the Macao SAR
source.scope: Official-source-backed Macao economic-year 2026 ordinary professional-tax schedule with the budget exemption and deduction.

MO.notes: Ordinary 2026 professional tax using the MOP 144,000 standard exemption, progressive 7% to 12% bands, 30% budget deduction and whole-pataca rounding. Enhanced exemptions and withholding administration remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Economic-year 2026 ordinary professional tax on caller-confirmed annual professional income before the standard exemption.
